mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_NM, PASSWORD, TEL, EMAIL, USE_YN, REG_DT FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}

SELECT MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_NM, TEL, EMAIL, USE_YN, REG_DT FROM MEMBER WHERE 1=1
AND MEMBER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND MEMBER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY MEMBER_ID ASC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM MEMBER WHERE 1=1
AND MEMBER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND MEMBER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
